brief: Wildfire smoke continues to affect US and Canada, while political tensions rise over NYC Mayor Mamdani's potential arrest of Netanyahu and Trump's spat with Italy. Research on writing instruction, AI coding agents, and human-robot juggling dominate today's papers.
news_summary: Wildfire smoke shifts but persists across US and Canada; NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani may order Netanyahu's arrest; White House backs Argentina players over Falklands banner; Ukraine drone attack kills 8 in Russia; Laos unable to determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol.
papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors in L2 writing instructors, children's intermodal writing, and ChatGPT's effects on personal statements. Other papers examine AI coding agent vulnerabilities and human-robot partner juggling.

en.brief: Wildfire smoke continues to affect US and Canada, while political tensions rise over NYC Mayor Mamdani's potential arrest of Netanyahu and Trump's spat with Italy. Research on writing instruction, AI coding agents, and human-robot juggling dominate today's papers.
en.news_summary: Wildfire smoke shifts but persists across US and Canada; NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani may order Netanyahu's arrest; White House backs Argentina players over Falklands banner; Ukraine drone attack kills 8 in Russia; Laos unable to determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol.
en.papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors in L2 writing instructors, children's intermodal writing, and ChatGPT's effects on personal statements. Other papers examine AI coding agent vulnerabilities and human-robot partner juggling.

zh.brief: 今日焦點：世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙，獎金創紀錄；英國工黨貝安德就任黨魁，中英關係受關注；香港國安法下禁書清單浮現。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽阿根廷與西班牙爭冠，獎金5000萬美元；貝安德接任工黨黨魁，中英關係走向引熱議；香港國安法催生「禁書時代」，多本書籍被下架或檢走。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無中文論文，英文論文探討寫作過程中的停頓、AI編碼代理安全、及多模態視覺化理解等主題。
